headline: Assessing Axon Enterprise (AXON) Valuation After Strong Q1 Growth And Raised AI And Counter Drone Outlook
summary: Axon Enterprise (AXON) is back in focus after reporting first quarter revenue growth of 34% year over year and lifting its full year revenue outlook to a range of 30% to 32%, pointing investors toward its expanding AI and counter drone ecosystem. See our latest analysis for Axon Enterprise. Axon’s share price has been volatile, with a 20.46% 1 month share price return and an 8.33% 7 day share price return following earnings and partnership news. Yet the year to date share price return is down...
